cards.q: كيف يمكن قياس التوافرية (Availability)؟
cards.a: يمكن قياسها بالنسبة لـ "100% operational". (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: ما هو تعريف هدف نقطة الاسترداد (Recovery Point Objective - RPO)؟
cards.a: كم من البيانات أنت مستعد لخسارتها؟ (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: ما هو تعريف هدف وقت الاسترداد (Recovery Time Objective - RTO)؟
cards.a: مقدار الوقت المتاح لإعادة النظام إلى حالة معروفة وقابلة للاستخدام بعد الفشل. (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: عند التخطيط لحلول عالية التوافرية، ما هو الشيء الذي يجب أخذه في الاعتبار؟
cards.a: المقايضة بين الميزانية والموارد والمعدات والأشخاص والمال والحل التقني. (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: ماذا يتناسب الحل عالي التوافرية بشكل غير مباشر مع؟
cards.a: مقدار فقدان البيانات المقبول وطول فترة التوقف عن العمل. (الصفحة 3)

cards.q: What is the Recovery Point Objective (RPO)?
cards.a: How much data are you prepared to lose? (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: What does the Recovery Time Objective (RTO) define?
cards.a: How much time is available to bring the environment up to a known and usable state after a failure. (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: According to HA/DR planning, what relationship exists between money available, acceptable data loss, and length of downtime?
cards.a: The amount of money available is inversely proportional to the amount of acceptable data loss and length of downtime. (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: What widely-held standard of availability is known as "five 9s"?
cards.a: 99.999 percent availability. (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: Which two values do businesses use to drive the HA/DR strategy?
cards.a: Recovery Point Objective (RPO) and Recovery Time Objective (RTO). (الصفحة 6)

cards.q: What are the two metrics that must be taken into account when considering High Availability (HA) vs. Disaster Recovery (DR)?
cards.a: RTO (Recovery Time Objective) and RPO (Recovery Point Objective) (Page 8)

cards.q: How is HA described in relation to its function?
cards.a: HA is a preventative idea that relies on keeping the server Online as much as possible (Available). (Page 8)

cards.q: What kind of concept is DR, and what does it deal with?
cards.a: DR is a curative idea; it deals with situations when a system needs to be recovered after a disaster. (Page 8)

cards.q: What is the goal of HA, and how does it differ from the scope of DR?
cards.a: The HA goal is to mitigate the downtime of the system; whereas DR deals with situations when a system needs to be recovered after a disaster. (Page 8)

cards.q: What relationship exists between cost and RPO in High Availability?
cards.a: HA costs more money, the shorter the RPO. (Page 8)

cards.q: ما هي فكرة عمل الـ Log Shipping؟
cards.a: تعتمد على أن السيرفر الأول (Primary) يتم أخذ نسخة احتياطية من ملفات السجل (Log file) ونسخها إلى مجلد مشترك ليتمكن سيرفر آخر من استعادة البيانات منه. (الصفحة 12)

cards.q: ما هي الخطوات الأساسية لعملية الـ Log Shipping التي يقوم بها SQL Agent؟
cards.a: نقل الباكاب من السيرفر الأول لمجلد مشترك، ثم نقلها إلى مجلد مشترك للسيرفر الثاني، وأخيراً الاستعادة على السيرفر المستهدف. (الصفحة 12)

cards.q: ما هو نوع الاسترداد الذي لا يعمل مع الـ Log Shipping؟
cards.a: Simple Recovery. (الصفحة 12)

cards.q: كيف يتم الانتقال إلى السيرفر الثاني أو الثالث في حالة وقوع السيرفر الأساسي باستخدام Log Shipping؟
cards.a: يكون انتقالاً يدوياً ويطلق عليه Failover. (الصفحة 12)

cards.q: ما هي الخيارات المتاحة للسيرفر الثانوي (Secondary Server) أثناء عملية الـ Log Shipping؟
cards.a: يمكن استخدامه للـ Read-Only أو يكون جاهزاً للعمل في حالة وقوع السيرفر الأساسي (Standby). (الصفحة 12)

cards.q: ما الأمر المستخدم لاستعادة قاعدة البيانات وتحديد أنها ليست في وضع الاسترداد؟
cards.a: `Restore Database ShipDB from Disk = 'E:\svu\bait\Demo\...\ShipDBFB.bak ' with norecovery` (الصفحة 13)

cards.q: ما المكون المسؤول عن أتمتة وجدولة العمليات مثل عمل النسخ الاحتياطي؟
cards.a: Job في SQL Server Agent (الصفحة 13)

cards.q: عند الوصول إلى خطوة الـ Restore من طريق الـ GUI، ما هما الوضعان المتاحان لتحديد وضع قاعدة البيانات؟
cards.a: No Recovery mode و Standard by mode (الصفحة 13)

cards.q: ما الأوامر المستخدمة لنقل ملفات قاعدة البيانات بعد عملية الاستعادة على السيرفر الثاني؟
cards.a: `Move "ShipDB_Data' to 'G:\new_DB\...\ShipDB_mirror_data.mdf', Move "ShipDB_Data' to 'G:\new_DB\...\ShipDB_mirror_log.ldf'` (الصفحة 13)

cards.q: ما الغرض من الأمر `Insert into shiptable values (1000)`؟
cards.a: إدخال بعض المعلومات إلى قاعدة البيانات في السيرفر الأول (الصفحة 13)

cards.q: What technology provides an inexpensive and easily managed HA and DR solution at the database level?
cards.a: SQL Server Transaction Log Shipping (الصفحة 16)

cards.q: For log shipping, what recovery model must a primary database be in?
cards.a: Full or Bulk Logged recovery model (الصفحة 16)

cards.q: What is the general principle of SQL Server Transaction Log Shipping?
cards.a: A primary database takes regular transaction log backups, which are transferred to a shared network location where secondary servers restore them to a standby database (الصفحة 16).

cards.q: If a log shipping configuration fails over, what is the process for ensuring zero data loss of committed transactions?
cards.a: The tail of the log on the primary server is backed up, transferred to the shared location, and restored after the latest regular transaction logs (الصفحة 18).

cards.q: When building a custom log shipping solution, what specific commands or modes must be used for restoration?
cards.a: Use the RESTORE feature with NORECOVERY, or RESTORE with STANDBY (الصفحة 16)

cards.q: What is Replication?
cards.a: A set of technologies for copying and distributing data and database objects from one database to another and then synchronizing between databases to maintain consistency. (Page 20)

cards.q: How can Log Shipping minimize data loss during failover?
cards.a: The environment can be back up again with zero data loss or minimal data loss (only the latest shipped transaction log was restored). (Page 20)

cards.q: In Replication, where is the Publisher located and what role does the Distributor play?
cards.a: The Publisher is located at the Master Database, and the Distributor is created when Subscribers are established in other branches/customers. (Page 20)

cards.q: What process characterizes Snapshot Replication?
cards.a: It involves transferring all data from the Publisher to the Subscriber. (Page 20)

cards.q: Name the three types of replication mentioned in the text.
cards.a: Snapshot Replication, Transactional Replication, and Merge Replication. (Page 20)

cards.q: What does Snapshot Replication provide?
cards.a: The initial data set for transactional and merge replication; It can also be used when complete refreshes of data are appropriate. (الصفحة 22)

cards.q: When is using snapshot replication by itself most appropriate?
cards.a: When data changes infrequently, when it is acceptable to have copies of data that are out of date with respect to the Publisher for a period of time, when replicating small volumes of data, or when a large volume of changes occurs over a short period of time. (الصفحة 22)

cards.q: Where is Transactional Replication typically applied?
cards.a: Applied where high latency is not allowed, such as an OLTP system for a bank, because you always need real-time updates of cash or stocks. (الصفحة 24)

cards.q: What are the key characteristics of Merge Replication?
cards.a: It is two-directional; it accepts lack of PK for each table (GUID will be created); and both Publisher and Subscriber remain active as Subscriber and Publisher respectively. (الصفحة 24)

cards.q: Name four scenarios where Transactional Replication is typically used?
cards.a: Improving scalability and availability, data warehousing and reporting, integrating data from multiple sites, or integrating heterogeneous data. (الصفحة 24)

cards.q: What initial step must be performed when using the Cluster Wizard?
cards.a: Select Servers (الصفحة 13)

cards.q: Before proceeding with cluster creation, what warning/check is displayed regarding validation?
cards.a: Validation Warning (الصفحة 14)

cards.q: What information must be entered in the "Access Point for Administering the Cluster" step?
cards.a: The name you want to use when administering the cluster, along with its IP address. (الصفحة 15)

cards.q: During the validation process, what is checked regarding connectivity and resources?
cards.a: Connectivity and resource availability for all nodes in the Validate a Configuration Wizard step. (الصفحة 13)

cards.q: What does the Confirmation screen allow the user to do before finalizing cluster creation?
cards.a: Review all settings, including the Cluster Name, IP Address, and listed nodes. (الصفحة 15)

cards.q: What feature in MS SQL Server provides high availability and disaster recovery?
cards.a: AlwaysOn High Availability (الصفحة 29)

cards.q: What is the container used to group databases for high availability and disaster recovery?
cards.a: Availability Group (الصفحة 30)

cards.q: Which wizard guides the user through setting up an AlwaysOn High Availability Group?
cards.a: AlwaysOn High Availability Group Wizard (الصفحة 28)

cards.q: Before creating a new availability group, what must be done in SQL Server Management Studio?
cards.a: Enable AlwaysOn High Availability (الصفحة 29)

cards.q: When specifying an availability group name, what information is required by the wizard?
cards.a: The name of the availability group (الصفحة 30)

cards.q: What is the primary purpose of using an Availability Group in MS SQL Server?
cards.a: To provide high availability and disaster recovery for databases by maintaining multiple copies (replicas) of the data (الصفحة 20)

cards.q: In the context of data synchronization, what does "Synchronous" replication ensure between replicas?
cards.a: That all transactions are committed to both the primary and secondary replica before being acknowledged (الصفحة 19)

cards.q: What is the initial step required when configuring a new Availability Group or adding a secondary replica?
cards.a: Specifying which databases will be included in the availability group (الصفحة 19)

cards.q: When viewing the status of replicas, what does it mean if a replica shows "Not Connected"?
cards.a: The replica is currently not communicating or connected to the primary replica (الصفحة 20)

cards.q: What action must be taken before specifying the connection for a secondary replica?
cards.a: Specifying the data synchronization preference for that replica (الصفحة 19)
